summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Taplo MVP - candidate nurturing SaaS tool. Backend APIs are 100% functional, frontend core features working well with minor session timeout issues.

integration_issues.issue: JWT tokens expire quickly (60 minutes) causing session timeouts during longer user flows

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero headline 'Never lose a great candidate again'
Waitlist form submission stores email successfully
Admin login with admin@taplo.io / TaploAdmin2026! works and redirects to dashboard
Dashboard shows candidate pipeline with all tabs (All, Silver Medallist, Not Ready Yet, Pipeline, Offer Declined)
Add Candidate dialog opens via button with all required fields
Sidebar navigation works for Pipeline, Daily Digest, Stats pages
Logout functionality works and redirects to login
All backend APIs (13/13) working: waitlist, auth, candidates CRUD, AI follow-up, digest, stats
AI follow-up generation API returns personalized messages with subject and body
Daily digest and stats endpoints return correct data structure
GDPR consent toggle present on Add Candidate form
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider increasing JWT token expiration time from 60 minutes to improve user experience during longer workflows. All core functionality is working correctly.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (core functionality working, minor session timeout issue)
